skip_reason: x-verified-by = claude-bib-audit-2026-05 (per audit instructions, skip claude-bib-audit-2026-05 and gemini-* stamps).

verdicts.issue: arXiv preprint (2009.06489) by Sara Hooker, Sept 2020. Content, author, year, and arXiv ID all match the canonical source. URL resolves. Minor: lacks x-verified-source and x-verified-status fields (older stamp format from web-search-manual-bib pass).

arXiv preprint (2310.01889) by Hao Liu, Matei Zaharia, Pieter Abbeel, Oct 2023. Title, authors, year, arXiv ID all confirmed. Lacks url field and x-verified-source/status fields (older pass-17-bib-hygiene stamp format). Suggest adding url = {https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.01889} for parity with other arXiv entries (e.g., gu2023mamba).
arXiv preprint (1805.02867) by Maxim Milakov and Natalia Gimelshein (NVIDIA), May 2018. Confirmed. Lacks url field and x-verified-source/status fields. Suggest adding url for consistency.

Patterson and Ditzel, ACM SIGARCH Computer Architecture News vol 8 no 6, Oct 1980, pp 25-33, DOI 10.1145/641914.641917. All metadata confirmed against ACM DL. Lacks x-verified-source and x-verified-status fields (older web-search-manual-bib stamp format).

Self-published artifact by the book's author (Vijay Janapa Reddi). URL https://mlsysbook.ai/mlsysim is the live project landing page but cannot be independently date-verified to 2026 via external indexing services. Content is the author's own; trust model relies on author's intent. Title contains $\cdot$ (math middle dot) which is a known LaTeX gotcha in some fields but appears OK here since it's in title rather than \index{}. Year 2026 matches current date.

Self-published artifact by the book's author. URL https://staffml.ai resolves. Same trust caveat as reddi2026mlsysim: independently un-indexable in scholarly databases. Title casing acceptable; {StaffML} acronym is properly braced.

Sze, Chen, Yang, Emer (2020), Synthesis Lectures on Computer Architecture, originally Morgan & Claypool (later transferred to Springer). DOI 10.1007/978-3-031-01766-7 resolves. Author list complete; series field present. Lacks x-verified-source and x-verified-status. Note: original publisher was Morgan & Claypool (2020 ISBN 978-1-68173-835-2); Springer reissued under DOI 10.1007/978-3-031-01766-7. Current entry says "Springer" which matches the live DOI landing page, so acceptable.

Blog-post citation missing url field. Per bib-check §4, every entry without page numbers needs a DOI or URL as canonical locator. Martin Thompson's 'Mechanical Sympathy' blog post (introducing the concept) was published July 2011 at https://mechanical-sympathy.blogspot.com/2011/07/why-mechanical-sympathy.html. Also, journal field 'Mechanical Sympathy Blog' should include the URL or be restructured as @misc with howpublished field.

suggested_fix.note: Consider restructuring as @misc since blog posts don't have a journal in the traditional sense.

verdicts.issue: Multiple violations. (1) Per §2 venue expansion: booktitle 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems' is missing the (NeurIPS) acronym tag — should be 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)'. (2) Per §3 publisher: 'Curran Associates Inc.' should drop 'Inc.' for consistency with other NeurIPS entries in this same file (e.g., dao2022flashattention, huang2019gpipe, rafailov2023direct all use bare 'Curran Associates'). (3) Missing pages: NIPS 2017 proceedings record this paper at pages 5998-6008 (per dl.acm.org/doi/10.5555/3295222.3295349). (4) Missing url. (5) x-verified-source URL points to papers.nips.cc but the entry itself has no url field.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)

verdicts.issue: Per §2 venue expansion: booktitle '16th USENIX Symposium on Operating Systems Design and Implementation (OSDI 22)' is acceptable in form (matches chen2018tvm pattern in same file). Missing url field (other USENIX entries in this file include url, e.g., chen2018tvm has url = {https://www.usenix.org/conference/osdi18/presentation/chen}). Author list confirmed: Gyeong-In Yu, Joo Seong Jeong, Geon-Woo Kim, Soojeong Kim, Byung-Gon Chun. Pages 521-538 confirmed. Year 2022 confirmed.
